comment:
Преобразуем:
$$\frac{2\cdot 3^x-\frac{90}{3^x}}{3^x-\frac{9}{3^x}}-1\geq 0$$
Замена: \(3^x=t\)
$$\frac{2t-\frac{90}{t}}{t-\frac{9}{t}}-1\geq 0$$
Запишем в виде:
$$\frac{2t^2-90}{t}:\frac{t^2-9}{t}-1\geq 0\\ \frac{2t^2-90}{t}\cdot\frac{t}{t^2-9}-1\geq 0$$
Сократим на \(t\), т. к. \(t=3^x>0\)
$$\frac{2t^2-90}{t^2-9}-1\geq 0\\ \frac{2t^2-90-t^2+9}{t^2-9}\geq 0\\ \frac{t^2-81}{t^2-9}\geq 0\\ \frac{(t-9)(t+9)}{(t-3)(t+3)}\geq 0$$
$$\displaystyle \left[ \begin{array}{l l} t\leq -9\\ \begin{cases} t >-3\\ t< 3 \end{cases}\\ t\geq 9 \end{array} \right.$$
Т. к. \(t=3^x>0\), то:
$$\displaystyle \left[ \begin{array}{l l} 0< t< 3\\ t\geq 9 \end{array} \right.$$
Вернемся к замене:
$$\displaystyle \left[ \begin{array}{l l} 3^{x} < 3^{1}\\ 3^{x} \geq 3^{2} \end{array} \right. \Rightarrow \left[ \begin{array}{l l} x< 1\\ x\geq 2 \end{array} \right.$$
Ответ: \(x\in (-\infty;1)\cup [2;+\infty)\).
